src: SSH3: faster and rich secure shell using HTTP/3, checkout our article here: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.08396 and our Internet-Draft: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-michel-ssh3/
ja: SSH3：HTTP/3 を使用した高速でリッチなセキュアシェル。論文: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.08396、Internet-Draft: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-michel-ssh3/
